followup_auto.title: ALLOCATION-FAMILY bounded apply
followup_auto.action: Run one bounded ALLO-only graph-demotion follow-up for ALLOCATION-FAMILY using the reviewed batch, then update review state.
followup_auto.why_now: Health is green, the reviewed batch is already marked ready, and this is the cleanest machine move that advances the graph without widening scope.
followup_auto.expected_artifact: One bounded apply result plus refreshed graph-demotion review state.

followup_human.title: Commitment continuity probe
followup_human.decision_needed: Answer the commitment continuity probe with one smallest next step worth protecting from forgetfulness.
followup_human.why_now: Continuity is still the live weak point, and leaving it vague will just keep leaking attention.

followup_human.title: Gold calibration check
followup_human.decision_needed: Decide whether Gold thresholds should be tuned now or whether low promotion volume is acceptable for this cycle.
followup_human.why_now: Gold is technically ready, but promoted count is still zero; that smells like either sparse intake or calibration drag.

stop_trigger: Stop if the ALLOCATION-FAMILY apply would spill outside the reviewed ALLO-only boundary or requires broader synthesis.
next_anchor: After the bounded apply lands, re-check graph-demotion review state first; only then revisit Gold calibration.
